summary:
Senior Retail Assistant with 11 years of experience across supermarkets,
department stores, and specialty retail. Licensed in Retail Sales Management
and recognized for leadership, staff training, and consistent achievement of
sales KPIs. Skilled at balancing customer satisfaction with operational
efficiency. Adept at supervising teams, handling escalated complaints, and
optimizing merchandising strategies.

raw_text_sections.full_text:
Senior Retail Assistant with 11 years of experience across supermarkets,
department stores, and specialty retail. Licensed in Retail Sales Management
and recognized for leadership, staff training, and consistent achievement of
sales KPIs. Skilled at balancing customer satisfaction with operational
efficiency. Adept at supervising teams, handling escalated complaints, and
optimizing merchandising strategies.

Jan 2025 - Present Senior Retail Assistant / Floor Supervisor
Macy s, Chicago, IL
Supervised team of 12 retail associates,
ensuring store standards and customer
satisfaction.
Increased monthly sales in home goods
department by 18% through upselling and
improved displays.
Resolved 95% of escalated customer
complaints without manager intervention.
Coordinated inventory audits and liaised with
suppliers, reducing out-of-stock items by 20%.
Implemented new training program for
onboarding staff, reducing turnover by 15%.
Aug 2019 - Dec 2024 Retail Assistant
Best Buy, Chicago, IL
Assisted customers with electronics purchases,
providing technical advice and product
comparisons.
Operated POS systems and processed
average daily transactions exceeding 10,000.
Organized weekly promotions and product
demos, increasing customer engagement.
Collaborated with management to achieve
quarterly sales goals consistently.

2012 - 2012 Bachelor s Degree in Marketing
University of Illinois, Chicago, IL

2020 Retail Sales Management Certificate
2019 Six Sigma Yellow Belt
